description: Rover from puma makes a trendy style statement combined with superior performance. These are great for regular wear as they ensure superior traction and protection to the feet, without compromising on comfort and style. Upper Canvas upper with foam padded lining for snug Fit Superior lining of foam on heel straps to prevent blisters Velcro straps for easy movement Soft footbed with ergonomical fit and massage nubs for utmost comfort Midsole Shock-absorbing lightweight phylon midsole for added comfort Outsole Rubber lugs in V-shaped pattern for firm grip on uneven terrain 3D brand logo at the centre shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash
